commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A repair worker can mechanically scope the lockfile to the advertised dependency update; otherwise a maintainer should intentionally review the broader dependency churn.; Needs attention: The patch touches the lockfile and appears to introduce dependency-resolution/integrity churn beyond the stated @types/node patch bump.; Review finding: [P1] Keep the lockfile scoped to the type package bump — pnpm-lock.yaml... commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the direct dev dependency `@types/node` from `^25.9.1` to `^25.9.2` and refreshes `pnpm-lock.yaml`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency maintenance PR rather than a reported runtime bug. The reviewable behavior is the manifest and lockfile diff scope.
